item.title: Stingrays are stinging more Southern Californians. Here’s why
item.description:
You’re most likely to get stung by a stingray during low tide on warm water days when the surf is relatively calm — basically when it’s an ideal beach day.

The post Stingrays are stinging more Southern Californians. Here’s why appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2023/06/23133845/Sting-7419.jpg)
You’re most likely to get stung by a stingray during low tide on warm water days when the surf is relatively calm — basically when it’s an ideal beach day.
The post [Stingrays are stinging more Southern Californians. Here’s why](https://lbpost.com/news/stingrays-are-stinging-more-southern-californians-heres-why) appeared first on [Long Beach Post News](https://lbpost.com/news).
